name: pi-mcp-adapter
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) adapter — connect Pi to MCP servers as tools.
author: earendil-works

name: pi-web-access
description: Web access tools: web search, fetch URL content, and PDF extraction.
author: earendil-works

name: @ollama/pi-web-search
description: Web search powered by Ollama's hosted web search API.
author: ollama

name: pi-simplify
description: Code-review subagent that pushes back on unnecessary complexity.
author: earendil-works

name: pi-lens
description: LSP + linter feedback surfaced inline to the agent after edits.
author: earendil-works

name: pi-powerline-footer
description: Powerline-style status bar footer for the Pi terminal UI.
author: earendil-works

name: @juicesharp/rpiv-ask-user-question
description: Structured ask-user-question tool with multiple-choice prompts.
author: juicesharp

name: @juicesharp/rpiv-todo
description: Persistent todo list tool the agent can read, append, and check off.
author: juicesharp

name: @juicesharp/rpiv-advisor
description: Advisor subagent that reviews plans before the worker commits to them.
author: juicesharp

name: @juicesharp/rpiv-web-tools
description: Web tools bundle: search, fetch, and screenshot helpers.
author: juicesharp

name: pi-plan-mode
description: Plan-first workflow: gather context and draft a plan before edits.
author: earendil-works

name: pi-git-tools
description: Higher-level git helpers (branch summaries, PR drafting, conflict triage).
author: community
